query_text: 我感到很痛苦，也很想被安慰，但仍然想抓住一点盼望

selected_emotions.explanation: sentiments of uncertainty and the weighing of options

cuv.raw_text: 我 将 这 些 事 告 诉 你 们 ， 是 要 叫 你 们 在 我 里 面 有 平 安 。 在 世 上 ， 你 们 有 苦 难 ； 但 你 们 可 以 放 心 ， 我 已 经 胜 了 世 界 。

counterpart.raw_text: I have said these things to you, that in me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation. But take heart; I have overcome the world."

cuv.raw_text: 你 们 现 在 也 是 忧 愁 ， 但 我 要 再 见 你 们 ， 你 们 的 心 就 喜 乐 了 ； 这 喜 乐 也 没 有 人 能 夺 去 。

counterpart.raw_text: So also you have sorrow now, but I will see you again and your hearts will rejoice, and no one will take your joy from you.

cuv.raw_text: 我 实 实 在 在 的 告 诉 你 们 ， 你 们 将 要 痛 哭 、 哀 号 ， 世 人 倒 要 喜 乐 ； 你 们 将 要 忧 愁 ， 然 而 你 们 的 忧 愁 要 变 为 喜 乐 。

counterpart.raw_text: Truly, truly, I say to you, you will weep and lament, but the world will rejoice. You will be sorrowful, but your sorrow will turn into joy.

cuv.raw_text: 在 指 望 中 要 喜 乐 ， 在 患 难 中 要 忍 耐 ， 祷 告 要 恒 切 。

counterpart.raw_text: Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, be constant in prayer.

cuv.raw_text: 耶 和 华 啊 ， 求 你 速 速 应 允 我 ！ 我 心 神 耗 尽 ！ 不 要 向 我 掩 面 ， 免 得 我 像 那 些 下 坑 的 人 一 样 。

counterpart.raw_text: Answer me quickly, O LORD! My spirit fails! Hide not your face from me, lest I be like those who go down to the pit.

esv.raw_text: I have said these things to you, that in me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation. But take heart; I have overcome the world."
Truly, truly, I say to you, you will weep and lament, but the world will rejoice. You will be sorrowful, but your sorrow will turn into joy.
Better is the end of a thing than its beginning, and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.
I know how to be brought low, and I know how to abound. In any and every circumstance, I have learned the secret of facing plenty and hunger, abundance and need.
It may be that their plea for mercy will come before the LORD, and that every one will turn from his evil way, for great is the anger and wrath that the LORD has pronounced against this people."

counterpart.raw_text: Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, be constant in prayer.

Better is the end of a thing than its beginning, and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.
I know how to be brought low, and I know how to abound. In any and every circumstance, I have learned the secret of facing plenty and hunger, abundance and need.
It may be that their plea for mercy will come before the LORD, and that every one will turn from his evil way, for great is the anger and wrath that the LORD has pronounced against this people."

esv.raw_text: Beloved, I pray that all may go well with you and that you may be in good health, as it goes well with your soul.
I am hard pressed between the two. My desire is to depart and be with Christ, for that is far better.
Yes, brother, I want some benefit from you in the Lord. Refresh my heart in Christ.
Behold, this city is near enough to flee to, and it is a little one. Let me escape there--is it not a little one?--and my life will be saved!"
For if a man finds his enemy, will he let him go away safe? So may the LORD reward you with good for what you have done to me this day.
Hear, you who are far off, what I have done; and you who are near, acknowledge my might.
I hope to see you soon, and we will talk face to face.
